title: Lunch Bag
description: This simple mod adds an item called the Lunch Bag. Food can be stored inside this item and eaten directly from.
body:
# Lunch Bag
This simple mod adds an item called the Lunch Bag. Food can be stored inside this item and eaten directly from it. The bag can be toggled between Open and Closed modes by using **Shift + Right-Click**.

- **Toggle Modes:** Shift + Right-Click to switch between modes.
- **Closed Mode:** Right-click to store food inside the bag.
- **Open Mode:** Right-click to eat food directly from the bag.
